help.header:
# Welcome to Pocket Tool!
You can view all the available commands by typing **` / `**, then clicking on my profile
help.locale:
## How to change slash command language?
Slash commands are available in multiple languages and will automatically match your **{{langSettings}}**
help.customizationInfo: You can change this bot's name, about me, avatar, and banner by simply clicking the customization button nearby
help.disableCommands: You can visit **{{disableCommandsBlogPost}}** to learn how to disable commands

buttons.missingPerm: You need the {{perm}} permission to do this
buttons.wrongChannel: You can only follow updates in text channels

modals.title: Customize Pocket Tool as you wish!
modals.header: ## Here you can configure Pocket Tool's guild profile
modals.name: What should my name be?
modals.nameDesc: This is the name that appears on my guild profile
modals.aboutMeDesc: This is the text that appears on my profile
modals.avatar: How should my new avatar look like?
modals.avatarDesc: This is the avatar that appears on my guild profile
modals.banner: What should my new banner look like?
modals.bannerDesc: This is the banner that appears on my guild profile
modals.placeholder: Leave blank to use the default value
modals.invalidFormat: The provided file is not a valid images

purge.invalidChannelType: This command can only be used in text based channels
purge.noMessagesWithContentFound: No messages found with the given content: {{content}}

emoji.invalidEmojis: The input does not contain any valid emojis
emoji.mixNotAvailable: No emoji mix available for this combination

remindme.reminderCreated:
Reminder created successfully
-# You will be reminded at {{date}}

sticky_message.stickyMessageNotFound: No sticky message found on this channel

modals.title: Sticky Message Setup
modals.header: ## Configure the sticky message module for the actual channel
modals.stickyMessageTextContent: Should the sticky message include text?
modals.stickyMessageTextContentDesc: Provide the content for the sticky message
modals.stickyMessageTextContentPlaceholder: Leave blank if you dont want to include text
modals.stickyMessageFiles: Should the sticky message include files?
modals.stickyMessageFilesDesc: Upload up to 4 files to include in the message
modals.stickyMessageEmpty: Sticky message couldn’t be saved because there’s no content to display
modals.stickyMessageLimitReached: Your guild has reached the maximum limit of 5 sticky messages

modals.guildHeader: ## Create a tag for your guild
modals.tagTextContentDesc: Provide the content for the tag
modals.tagTextContentPlaceholder: Leave blank if you don't want to include text
modals.tagFilesDesc: Upload up to 4 files to include in the message
modals.tagEmpty: Tag: {{name}} couldn't be saved because there's no content to display

interactionCreate.agreement_terms_accepted:
Terms of Service and Privacy Policy accepted! Thank you for your acceptance
-# Please re-run the command to use it
interactionCreate.guildRateLimited: This guild has reached the limit of {{limit}} uses of {{command}} per {{time}}. Please try again in {{cooldown}}.
interactionCreate.channelRateLimited: This channel has reached the limit of {{limit}} uses of {{command}} per {{time}}. Please try again in {{cooldown}}.
interactionCreate.userRateLimited: You have reached the limit of {{limit}} uses of {{command}} per {{time}}. Please try again in {{cooldown}}
interactionCreate.missingAuthorPerms: You lack the following permissions: {{perms}} required to use this command
interactionCreate.missingBotPerms: I lack the following permissions: {{perms}} required to perform this action
interactionCreate.commandErrored:
The command: {{command}} has encountered an error. Please try again later
-# If you believe this is a bug, please report it to our {{server}}

stickyMessage.warn: -# This is an automated sticky message
